title: Get 100TB of lifetime encrypted cloud storage with Internxt for $975
excerpt: Enough room for years of files.
content_html:
TL;DR: Get 100TB of encrypted cloud storage for life with Internxt for $974.97 (reg. $9,900) until July 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT.

Credit: Internxt

$974.97
$9,900 Save $8,925.03

If your work generates vast amounts of data, storage limits have a way of catching up with you. Internxt’s 100TB Lifetime Cloud Storage plan is built for businesses, agencies, creative professionals, and other power users who need room to archive years of files without adding another monthly bill. New users can get lifetime access for $974.97 (reg. $9,900) through July 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT.

Its storage capacity of 100TB leaves plenty of room to grow. Whether you’re storing years of client projects, high-res photo libraries, video footage, design assets, or long-term business records, this plan is designed to handle enterprise-scale storage without recurring subscription costs.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Internxt uses zero-knowledge, end-to-end encryption, meaning files are encrypted before they leave your device and remain inaccessible even to Internxt itself. It also uses post-quantum encryption, is open source, has undergone an independent security audit by Securitum, and complies with GDPR privacy standards.

Files sync across Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, and web browsers, with support for unlimited devices. Sharing files and folders with collaborators is built in, making the service practical for teams working across different operating systems.

This offer is available to new users only and covers encrypted file storage and sharing, not Internxt’s other services such as Mail, Meet, Backups, or Antivirus. If you eventually need more than 100 TB, additional plans must be purchased separately, as storage plans can’t be combined.

If you’ve outgrown traditional cloud storage plans or simply want to stop paying monthly fees for business-scale storage, this deal is for you!

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Get Internxt’s 100TB Lifetime Cloud Storage plan while it’s on sale for $974.97 (reg. $9,900) through July 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT.

StackSocial prices subject to change.

content_html_zh:
TL;DR：在 7 月 26 日晚上 11:59 之前，只需 974.97 美元（原价 9,900 美元）即可通过 Internxt 终身获得 100TB 加密云存储。 PT。

图片来源：Internxt

$974.97
$9,900 Save $8,925.03

如果您的工作生成大量数据，那么存储限制可能会困扰您。 Internxt 的 100TB 终身云存储计划专为企业、机构、创意专业人士和其他需要空间来存档多年文件而无需增加每月账单的高级用户而设计。 新用户可以在 7 月 26 日晚上 11:59 之前以 974.97 美元（原价 9,900 美元）获得终身访问权限。 PT。

其 100TB 的存储容量留有充足的增长空间。 无论您是存储多年的客户项目、高分辨率照片库、视频片段、设计资产还是长期业务记录，该计划都旨在处理企业规模的存储，而无需重复订阅成本。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

Internxt 使用零知识、端到端加密，这意味着文件在离开您的设备之前会被加密，甚至 Internxt 本身也无法访问。 它还使用后量子加密，是开源的，经过了 Securitum 的独立安全审核，并符合 GDPR 隐私标准。

文件可跨 Windows、macOS、Linux、Android、iOS 和 Web 浏览器同步，支持无限设备。 内置与协作者共享文件和文件夹，使该服务对于跨不同操作系统工作的团队来说非常实用。

此优惠仅适用于新用户，涵盖加密文件存储和共享，不包括 Internxt 的其他服务，例如邮件、会议、备份或防病毒。 如果您最终需要超过 100 TB，则必须单独购买额外的计划，因为存储计划无法组合。

如果您已经无法满足传统的云存储计划，或者只是想停止支付企业规模存储的月费，那么这项交易适合您！

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

获取 Internxt 的 100TB 终身云存储计划，优惠价为 974.97 美元（原价 9,900 美元），截至 7 月 26 日晚上 11:59。 PT。

StackSocial 价格可能会发生变化。
